name: Chili-Garlic Mustard Greens
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Green or purple mustard greens - washed, dried and cut into strips
Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large sauté pan, heat sesame and olive oils over high heat until hot but not smoking.
2. Add the greens and stir for 1 minute or until they have turned bright green.
3. Add garlic, chili, and ginger, stirring constantly for 30 seconds. Then add vinegar and sugar. Remove from heat and stir to combine. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings. Approximate nutritional analysis per serving: 150 calories, 14 grams fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 20 milligrams sodium (before salting), 3 grams protein, 5 grams carbohydrate.
